name: Block Production and Routing Automation
intent: Automate the production and routing of project blocks. Implementing agents output typed JSON (execution-results). Workflow post-steps route fields to the right blocks — decisions to decisions.json, issues to gaps.json, test counts to inventory.json. Analysis agents produce architecture.json and runtime-spec.json from the codebase. Command steps produce inventory.json from deterministic queries. Audit workflows produce audits/*.json from conformance-reference.json. The manual process of reading agent prose and updating blocks by hand becomes a workflow.

success_criteria.criterion: Implementing agent execution-results.decisions field auto-appends to decisions.json
Implementing agent execution-results.issues field auto-appends to gaps.json
Command step produces inventory.json from deterministic queries (find, wc, test runner)
Analysis agent produces architecture.json from codebase reading
Audit workflow consumes conformance-reference.json, produces audit.schema.json-conforming output
Post-implementation state.json auto-updates current_spec, test_count, last_commit
No manual block editing required after workflow execution

specs.name: Execution Results Router
specs.intent: Transform step or command step that reads execution-results.json and appends/updates the right project blocks (decisions.json, gaps.json, inventory.json, state.json)
acceptance_criteria: Appends issues to gaps.json as new gaps
Updates last_commit and current_spec in state.json
Idempotent: re-running with same input doesn't duplicate entries

specs.name: Inventory Refresh Workflow
specs.intent: Workflow of command steps that deterministically counts tests, enumerates step types, lists agent specs, lists schemas, lists demos — producing inventory.json without LLM
acceptance_criteria: Enumerates step types from types.ts or step-*.ts files

specs.name: Architecture Analysis Workflow
specs.intent: Agent reads codebase and produces architecture.json — modules, compilation pipeline, execution model. Replaces manual architecture block authoring.
acceptance_criteria: Produces module list with file, responsibility, lines, exports
Describes compilation pipeline from agent-spec.ts and step-shared.ts

specs.name: Conformance Audit Workflow
specs.intent: Workflow that reads conformance-reference.json, runs automated checks, dispatches agent for semantic analysis, produces audit.schema.json-conforming output
acceptance_criteria: Command steps run grep/command checks from reference rules
Agent step performs semantic analysis (inspect-type rules)
Findings reference principle IDs from conformance reference

specs.name: Self-Maintaining Demo
specs.intent: End-to-end: run implementation → route results to blocks → refresh inventory → audit → update gaps. The project maintains its own structured state through workflow execution.
acceptance_criteria: Router step updates decisions, gaps, state blocks
All blocks validate after workflow completes
